summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed a Russian Ka-52 attack helicopter near Nadiivka in Donetsk region using an FPV drone, with additional drones striking the crew during their evacuation attempt. The 59th Brigade also downed another Ka-52 on the Pokrovsk axis with an FPV drone, marking a rare instance of a helicopter being destroyed by this type of drone. Separately, an FPV drone strike hit a Ukrainian BUK air defense system near Bolshoy Sokolny Island. Other incidents include a Russian soldier being struck by two Ukrainian FPV drones simultaneously while hiding behind a tree, and a Russian infantryman losing a duel against an FPV drone after charging with a bayonet.
